summary_ja: 5 raw backlog articles triaged. take=0 (existing wiki coverage is good). skip=2 (non-AI: Boyter China travel blog, Paul Graham fundraising essay), reference=3 (AI-related but already captured: Subliminal Learning paper, Reiner Pope chip design lecture, AINews GLM-5 digest).

decisions.title: China Trip 2
decisions.reason_ja: Non-AI content - 2004 personal travel blog from China. No AI/LLM relevance.
decisions.body_excerpt: Personal travel blog from China, 2004. Snow, food, temples, cultural observations. No AI content.

decisions.title: Language models transmit behavioural traits through hidden signals in data
decisions.reason_ja: Anthropic Subliminal Learning paper (Nature 2026) full text. Already covered in concepts/behavioral-trait-transmission.md (created 2026-04-16 via True Positive Weekly #157). No new findings in body text.
decisions.body_excerpt: Experimental setup: distillation on unrelated domain. Teacher fine-tuned on trait, student trained on filtered outputs. Misalignment transmitted through numbers, code, and CoT traces even after heavy filtering.

decisions.title: How to Raise Money
decisions.reason_ja: PG 2013 startup fundraising essay. No AI/LLM relevance.
decisions.body_excerpt: September 2013 essay on startup fundraising. Three-phase path, investor psychology, forces acting on founders.

decisions.title: Reiner Pope - Chip design from the bottom up
decisions.reason_ja: Reiner Pope x Dwarkesh chip design lecture. Already captured in entities/reiner-pope.md and entities/matx.md (2026-05-23 blog-wiki-ingest). No new content gaps.
decisions.body_excerpt: Blackboard lecture with Reiner Pope (CEO of MatX): logic gates to systolic arrays, Dadda multiplier, FP4 vs FP8 quadratic scaling, data movement cost dominance, pipeline registers.

decisions.title: [AINews] Z.ai GLM-5: New SOTA Open Weights LLM
decisions.reason_ja: AINews GLM-5 digest. Already covered in entities/glm-5-zai.md, entities/minimax.md, concepts/china-agentic-coding-sprint.md. GLM-5 specs (744B/40B active, 28.5T tokens, DeepSeek Sparse Attention), MIT license, BF16 release, benchmark results all reflected in existing pages.
decisions.body_excerpt: AI News digest covering GLM-5 launch: 744B params/40B active, 28.5T tokens, DeepSeek Sparse Attention, 200K context, MIT license, BF16 release, VendingBench2 SOTA among open models.
